_meta.description: Sprite manifest for all skill/VFX effect assets. Use this file to quickly find effect spritesheets by type, color, and size.
_meta.format: Each effect has individual PNG frame sequences in PNG/ and packed spritesheets (spritesheet.png + spritesheet.txt) in spritesheet/

sprites.description: Circular energy burst aura with glowing core, good for power-ups or shields
Motion trail whoosh effect for dash or teleport movement
Lightning zap burst with crackling electric sparks
Protective energy shield barrier bubble effect
Classic cloud explosion burst with fiery core
Dust cloud puff on ground impact or landing
Sharp impact strike effect for melee hits and collisions
Magic puff burst with radiating spikes, good for spell casting
Liquid splash effect with droplets, good for water or potions
Liquid splatter effect for blood, paint, or poison impacts

packs.name: Super Pixel Effects Pack 2
packs.note: fx2_bubble has sub-states: _appear, _loop, _pop for each color variant

sprites.description: Animated bubble effect with appear, loop, and pop phases

Electric energy burst with lightning tendrils
Stylized explosion with purple smoke and orange claw tendrils
Bright fire burst with white-blue core and red-orange flames
Ice crystal burst with frozen shard fragments
Circular shockwave ring impact with radiating lines
Magical energy swirl vortex, good for spell charging
Curved energy slash trail for sword or melee attacks
Liquid splatter burst variant with chunky droplets
Chomping bite attack with snapping jaws
Dust trail for running or ground movement
Sharp hit impact burst for combat feedback
Lightning aura surrounding effect for charged states
Magical spawn or summon portal effect
Smoke bomb explosion cloud for stealth or area denial
Splatter impact variant for liquid or blood effects
Cartoon-style bright explosion burst with glowing crescent
Cartoon-style impact hit with comic-book energy lines
Warp portal effect with ring and radiating energy patterns

packs.name: Super Pixel Effects Gigapack
packs.note: Organized by category subfolders. PNG path: PNG/{category}/{id}/{id}_{size}_{color}/. Spritesheet path: spritesheet/{category}/{id}/{id}_{size}_{color}/

packs.name: Super Pixel Fantasy FX Pack 1
packs.note: Fantasy spell casting effects with multiple variants (A/B/C/D) per spell type. Naming: fanfx1_{id}_{variant}_{size}_{color}. Spellcast C has front/back orientations.

sprites.description: Magical casting circle with sparkling ring particles and glowing center — 4 variants (A/B/C/D)
Concentrated magical energy burst with radiating particles — 2 variants (A/B)
Soft magical cloud puff with gentle particle dispersion — 2 variants (A/B)
Upward energy surge indicating power enhancement or level-up
Skull-shaped magical cloud effect with ethereal particles — dark magic

packs.name: Super Pixel Fantasy FX Pack 2
packs.note: Elemental spell effects (fire, ice, lightning, wind, earth, poison) and combat effects. Naming: fanfx2_{id}_{size}_{color}. Lightning has start/loop/end + tileable variants. Cure has front/back orientations.

sprites.description: Red and orange flame spell with white-blue core, upward embers — fire magic
Crystalline ice formation with frost particles — ice magic
Vertical lightning bolt with crackling energy — has start/loop/end phases + tileable variants for continuous beams
Swirling wind vortex with air particles — wind magic
Healing energy with gentle upward particles — restoration spell. Has front/back orientations.
sprites.note: Has front and back orientation variants

sprites.description: Sharp claw swipe attack with impact particles — physical combat
Energy absorption effect with inward particle flow — mana/life drain
Toxic cloud with bubbling particles — poison/toxic damage
Explosive shatter with fragment particles — breaking/destruction effect
Ground spikes emerging with earth particles — earth magic

packs.name: Super Pixel Fantasy FX Pack 3
packs.note: Status effects and buff/debuff spell animations. Naming: fanfx3_{id}_{size}_{color}.

sprites.description: Light blue diagonal beam with pink and purple fragments — damage/pain indicator
Dark energy with fading particles — death/instant kill spell
Protective shield barrier with energy field — defensive buff
Speed enhancement effect with motion trails — haste/speed buff
Restorative energy with healing particles — HP regeneration over time
Time-slowing effect with deceleration particles — slow debuff
Time-stop effect with frozen particles — stun/freeze debuff
Hypnotic gaze effect with eye-like particles — charm/confuse debuff
Attack power boost with upward energy surge — attack buff
Defense enhancement with protective aura — defense buff

packs.name: Will's Magic Pixel Particle Effects
packs.description: Hand-crafted pixel art magic particle effects. One-shot animations with individual frames and spritesheets. Most are 50x50 frames.
packs.note: Each effect folder contains: frames/ (individual PNGs), spritesheet.png, spritesheet.txt

sprites.description: Yellow-orange energy burst with blue-purple rings expanding outward
Vibrant magical charge with colorful radiating energy particles, longer buildup
Bright yellow-orange flame burst with pink-purple accents
Pink-magenta magical energy burst fading to purple and cyan
Bright green-yellow burst radiating from white core
Symmetrical light green arcs framing vertical blue-teal energy streaks
Bright pink-purple starburst with radiating horizontal trails collapsing inward
Red-orange energy burst with white center and chaotic expansion
Colorful pixel particles forming upward-curving arc in red-orange-blue
Light blue-purple pixel particles scattered in magical shimmer cloud
Pink-magenta-purple pixel particles in upward-curving spiral arc
Ethereal cluster of tiny bright pink-magenta wisping particles
Library of individual particle sprites: cloud particles (16x16, 8 frames), rainbow particles (2-3 frames), static sprites (2x2 to 138x138). Building blocks for custom effects.
sprites.note: Not a sequential animation — a sprite library of particle building blocks

sprites.description: Light purple shield outline expanding with pink-faced star center
Vertical reddish-orange energy plume with small purple ring accents
Scattered light blue and white sparkles in magical shimmer pattern
Symmetrical nested rotated square outlines in hot pink and light purple
Glowing pink pixel art sword outline with energetic brighter pink core
Symmetrical light green curved arcs flanking vertical blue energy surge
Bright pink-yellow-orange burst with thick C-shaped arcs and vertical energy stream
Vibrant purple-pink spiral dissipating as it expands outward
